channel.title: My New Hugo Site :)
channel.description: Recent content on My New Hugo Site :)

item.title: About
item.author: joao.rosado.ribeiro@gmail.com (Welcome)
item.description: This is supposed to be a page about myself but idk what to write, so here are things that I remember I guess ¯\_(ツ)_/¯ Things that I like Linux ( I use Arch btw ) Build cli tools in Rust ( because the future will be written in Rust as you know ) Trying new editors ( but stuck in Vim bc idk how to exit ) Anime ( I enjoy slice of life animes :P ) Things that I created vizer-cli - a cli tool to watch movies/series/animes in portuguese; pomachat - a chat app built with Flutter (almost like Discord); piaget-cli - a cli tool to read my university emails.
